name: normal_or_hpv_negative_low_risk
description: Normal or HPV-negative low-risk screening profile.

name: hpv_positive_nilm_surveillance
description: HPV-positive profile with negative cytology or surveillance-level risk.

name: ascus_or_lsil_low_grade_abnormality
description: Low-grade cytologic abnormality such as ASC-US or LSIL.

name: asch_or_agc_high_risk_triage
description: Atypical high-risk triage profile such as ASC-H or AGC.

name: hsil_or_cin2plus_high_grade_lesion
description: High-grade lesion profile consistent with HSIL or CIN2+ risk.

name: cancer_suspicious_invasive_disease
description: Cancer-suspicious profile requiring urgent diagnostic confirmation.
